response: Japan has a population of 125 million and a robust economy with a GDP of $4.2 trillion, though its growth rate is modest at 1.1%. The country enjoys a very low unemployment rate of 2.6%, but faces challenges including an inflation rate of 3.2% and a public debt level exceeding 263% of its GDP. Notably, Japan has a high life expectancy of 84.6 years and exports worth $756 billion annually.
